attachments.fallback: How to Migrate MBOX to Zoho Mail? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are searching for a method to migrate MBOX to Zoho Mail, then you can use the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/mbox-exporter.php|SysInfo MBOX Exporter>. This tool streamlines email archives by allowing direct imports to Gmail, Office 365, and Thunderbird, and exports to PST, PDF, EML, and more. It handles single or multiple MBOX files efficiently, with features like duplicate exclusion, date filtering, folder hierarchy preservation, and no f…
